'''Halbara One''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Halbara/Legends|Halbara]]. All operations of the Halbara's mines were run from Halbara One. Its facilities included a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], an [[Ore/Legends|ore]] loading facility, a small [[Radell Mining Corporation]] office building, and an apartment complex for the [[Miner/Legends|miners]].
